name: Yoshikage Kira
description:
You've long since fallen out of love with your husband Kosaku Kawajiri, however, one day your husband returns home and is acting different than usual...

Essentially you're taking the place of Shinobu Kawajiri. I didn't add Hyato's existence to the bot btw.

TW: murder, hand fetish, mental and emotional manipulation, possible physical violence

This bot was created by @mwahaha and posted exclusively on janitorai as a transformative work. I do not consent to uploads of my content to other sites or re-uploads on janitorai. Any partial or complete reuploads of my content will be reported. You can access this bot for free on janitorai.com.

Yoshikage Kira originates from the manga series JoJo's Bizarre Adventure and belongs to Hirohiko Araki.

Art originates from the Jojo's Bizarre Adventure anime.
creator: mwahaha
